el8_amd64_gcc12.title: cms-common: zsh: avoid autocompletion error message

merged_prs.title: Restore correct HadronizerFilter logic
Lowered cluster charge threshold for pixel L1
Add reco::GenParticle collection production from HepMC3 event record
Add phase-2 OT cluster size to tracking ntuple
[MiniAOD] Update TauID selection for METUncertainties calculation, add pileup Id & UParTv1 for puppiJetMETReclustering
[MiniAOD, NanoAOD] AK8 subjets pT regression nodes, Photon TrigObj & MET fixes
Run3-gex187P Provide a way to avoid saving hits for a list of GEM chambers (eg missing GE11 chambers)
Remove excessive includes in DataFormats/Provenance
Remove configuration support for SubProcess and its tests
Add Process name, reduced configuration ID, and ParameterSet ID to the JobReport
Fix missing type declaration in EdmEventSize
Reduce and unify tagger inputs
Custom Phase-2 L1 Trigger NanoAOD
Integrating Particle Flow Network (PFN) Models into TICLv5
Create new main ProductRegistry if input products change
Fix endcap assignment of L1 Muon stubs
HepMC3 output for HadronizerFilter
add missing defaults to `MkFitProducer::fillDescriptions`
[LLVM Analyzer][DQM] Fix some static analyzer warnings
Compartmentalize how ProductRegistry is filled
remove `hltOnlineBeamSpotESProducer_cfi` from NGT scouting menu
add fillDescriptions to several Strip modules used at HLT
Added algorithm header needed for std::transform
[UBSAN] added deps on TrackerRecHit2D for BaseTrackerRecHit
Include CICADA v2.2.0 configuration as modification to 2025 L1T Era
[FULLSIM] Extended SIM exception
Remove FinalPath from the framework
Add HLT tracking monitoring in cosmics
2025 Scenario
Run3-gex187N Update all Run3 scenarios to accommodate the changes for RPC correction for phi staggering and z-position
Fix typo in g4SimHits cfg
Run3-187O Create an XML file for gem11 without chambers 6, 7, 8 on -z side for 2025
Update OnlineBeamMonitor for DIP publication
Function to set tracker bounds in KalmanVertexFitter
MtdValidation: add plots on track multiplicity
Port recent changes from Pythia8Hadronizer to Pythia8HepMC3Hadronizer
Removed unneeded code in StreamerInputSource
[NGT] add validation (w.r.t. SIM) step for Phase-2 HLT timing and NGT workflows
Increase threshold of max number of strips clusters for cosmics
